reviews.author: Katerina Odin
reviews.text: Totally sad site. Don’t know why but all restaurants are broken, no one is there. All full of rubbish and plastic. All reviews are either years ago or who knows… but definitely abandoned now

reviews.author: Hooman Being
reviews.text: Stunning beach. 🏝️ Hear the birds sing while swimming. Lay down in the rock and watch birds are dancing and singing in the blue sky. Impressive!!!!!

reviews.author: Nguyen Candy
reviews.text: nice many coral in this beach, sad because it dead for reason , maybe they dont take care of beach well or other reason, im not sure but not much coral in bottom they used bomb for fish here that is kinda sad because this place very nice but use that kind of shit for fish is terrible

reviews.author: Rocío Verónica Pagés
reviews.text: We went to ly son with my boyfriend for too nights. Our first Lunch was here. It was so good we ended up having all our meals here. I loved the braised fish, increíble dish!! We order it three times. In the afternoon they have fresh fish and stuff. We also have crab and a steamed red fish both great. Thanh was a young guy really kind and talk with us with Google translate (in the island there Is no much occidental turism). I trully recomend it !

reviews.author: Takeshi Matsumura
reviews.text: Sea side cafe with very nice view. Staff were kind although I speak no Vietnamese. Enjoyed coffee and relaxing time.

reviews.author: Bình Ngô Tấn
reviews.text: Come suitable for beach camping n sea bathing n swimming in group of guys. There is such a crystal sandy beach running around a marvelous cliff, 2 in 1 gets y pleased n excited surely.however One minus may that garbage is threw all over the beach sight, so it is not a nice view for pictures.

reviews.author: nadia
reviews.text: It is the end of February, but it is too cold and there are no people and the restaurant is under construction. But the view was the best. It was hard because the waves were strong, but I stayed for a long time.

reviews.author: Tony Le
reviews.text: Pros: used to be purely beautiful scenery and still is but under poor management 🚩Cons: DO NOT eat the foods here. We ordered almost 1 million VND for the meal for 2 pax. The foods were either uncooked or rotten (fish and chicken). They told us they would refund but we had to pay first. My partner got food poisoned that day and stayed in hospital for 1 night and they never returned the money. One rotten apple spoils the barrel. Ly Son could be much better without these kind of poor service and hygiene.

reviews.author: Wouter Sligter
reviews.text: Best coffee place on the island. Hammocks, sea side, WiFi. Limited menu.

reviews.author: Ja Pakse
reviews.text: The sea is verry nice, people are freindly from 14/03/2018

reviews.author: Theodor Sandu
reviews.text: Super cool semi-hidden beach. I loved the seafoood and the snorkeling.

reviews.author: Ngoc Son Nguyen
reviews.text: A must visit in the island, very unique and beautiful.

reviews.author: Herbage Lee
reviews.text: This beach is large enough for maybe hundreds people to swim. Personally I don't like swimming so I'm here to take some pictures and search for shells. Quite beautiful.

reviews.author: Christine Ngo
reviews.text: The seafood overall is fresh. The sentinel crab however wasn’t fresh and was from the island which is upsetting if you were to eat on an island. Customer service is great and helpful but the cooking time took FOREVER. Was supposed to eat rice with canh chưa but didn’t get the canh until we finished eating. We also ordered fried rice and also got it at the end (another table that came later had theirs first).

reviews.author: Mr Zent
reviews.text: Good place. The juices is great to choise.

reviews.author: Paul Weijers
reviews.text: A must-see when at Ly Son Island.

reviews.author: Thuyen Van Nguyen
reviews.text: Clean water and can go snorkeling.

reviews.author: Ryan Le
reviews.text: Great place to swim because the water is very clear. The fruits sold there are also cheap and good.

reviews.author: Nhài Thanh
reviews.text: For the beauty of this scenery, nothing is argued. Great natural place to contemplate the beaty of the beach, sea at Ly Son

reviews.author: Rainer de Reuter
reviews.text: Great place to hang out at day or night time. Always a fresh breeze from the ocean and a nice view.

reviews.author: Jacques Jordaan
reviews.text: Great spot to relax. Be careful of the coral going out to swim and snorkel

reviews.author: Quang
reviews.text: Very nice place to visit. You can come here with your family or friends.

reviews.author: Gió biển Sam
reviews.text: So amazing, wonderful, natural. Recommend strongly you should to visit it

reviews.author: Dom Tran
reviews.text: Nice cafe. Won’t find better place because there are none.

reviews.author: Antoine Sirot
reviews.text: Fresh live seafood but little cooking choices

reviews.author: Minh Tri Tran
reviews.text: Definitely the best place in big Ly son island.
